Event: The Pharaoh Treasure Hunt
Event Date: 05/09/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: SC35
Azure Prophet Scepter

Once in a while, the unit hits the enemy unit with the lowest current health with a lightning bolt. It deals 160000 (+bonus of spell power) pure damage and applies electric pulse to the target for 3 sec. If the unit has less than 25% health after being struck by lightning, all the other enemy units will be hit by lightning bolts and take 140000 magic damage. Whenever the unit affected by electric pulse uses an ability, they are struck by a lightning discharge that deals 100000 magic damage to that unit and all enemies in a small radius around them. All affected units are also stunned for 0,5 sec. Additionally, the main target of the ability has their physical and magic armor reduced by 10% for 2 sec and takes 84000 magic damage for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: The Pharaoh Treasure Hunt

Event date: 05/09/2025

Sage bot code: SC35

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
